/usr/bin/cc -g -arch x86_64 -mmacosx-version-min=10.9 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o ../MT2PaneRefresh.dylib -install_name @rpath/MT2PaneRefresh.dylib CMakeFiles/MT2PaneRefresh_dylib.dir/mt2_prefpane_refresh/mt2_prefpane_refresh.c.o CMakeFiles/MT2PaneRefresh_dylib.dir/__/src/mt2_pane_sm.c.o CMakeFiles/MT2PaneRefresh_dylib.dir/__/src/mt2_single_load.c.o  -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation -framework Carbon -lobjc
